activities_projects.title: Identification of Food Crops
activities_projects.objective: Understand different types of crops used for food
steps: Collect samples of cereals, pulses and oil seeds
Observe their physical characteristics
Classify them into cereals, pulses and oil seeds
Record observations in a table
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies different food crops and their categories

activities_projects.title: Kharif and Rabi Crop Chart
steps: List crops grown in Kharif and Rabi seasons
Prepare a chart showing both categories
Add examples like rice, maize, wheat and mustard
Display the chart in class
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and presentation of chart (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Composting Demonstration
steps: Collect plant waste such as leaves and vegetable peels
Place them in a container with soil
Add moisture and keep it covered
Observe decomposition over time
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains how organic waste forms manure

activities_projects.title: Irrigation Methods Study
steps: Research different irrigation methods such as wells, canals and tanks
Write short notes about each method
Draw simple diagrams for explanation
Present findings in class
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and completeness of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Mixed Cropping Model
steps: Choose two crops grown together such as wheat and gram
Draw a field layout showing both crops
Label the crops and explain the benefit
Write a short description below the diagram

activities_projects.title: Weed Identification Activity
activities_projects.objective: Identify weeds present in crop fields
steps: Visit a nearby garden or field
Identify weeds growing among crops
Note their characteristics
Record observations with sketches or photos
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes weeds and their impact on crops
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of observation and notes (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Animal Husbandry Information Chart
steps: List different types of animal husbandry like cattle, poultry and fisheries
Write their uses and products
Draw simple pictures representing each type
Prepare a labeled chart

activities_projects.title: Poultry Farm Observation
materials: Local farm visit or online resources
steps: Observe a poultry farm or watch an educational video
Note the types of birds raised
Record feeding and housing conditions
Summarize observations in the notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands management practices in poultry farming
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of observations and summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Fish Farming Study
steps: List examples of marine and inland fish
Write the differences between capture fishing and fish farming
Draw a simple fish pond diagram
Explain composite fish culture briefly
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of explanation and diagram (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Bee-Keeping Awareness Poster
steps: Research the importance of bees in honey production
Draw a beehive and worker bees
Write benefits of bee-keeping
Create a colorful awareness poster
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands role of bees in agriculture and honey production
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and accuracy of information (10 marks)
